Step 1 is incorrect. The function f_select_column is intended to remove irrelevant columns and retain only those needed to answer the question (here, primarily the "canadian airdate" column, possibly along with identifiers). Using f_select_column(*) keeps all columns, fails to narrow the table to the relevant column, and misapplies the function’s purpose.
